_backup_note: POST-fix reference of SyncView Calendar — Upsert Post (pWSqaqVw7dmqhYOA): adds the read-failure guard to 'Merge Comments' (early-return {ok:false} on a Google Sheets read error via the Is Conflict no-write path) so a Sheets outage no longer throws the phantom-row guard / bypasses the link guards. ONLY 'Merge Comments'.jsCode differs from calendar-upsert-post.2026-06-14.pre-readfail-guard.json. Not yet published as of file creation — n8n draft staged via MCP; Sidney publishes in the n8n UI.
name: SyncView Calendar — Upsert Post

nodes.name: Read Link Twins
nodes.notes: Rows in this tab whose linear_issue_id equals the incoming one. Lookup falls back to the __no_link__ sentinel when the incoming link is blank so it never matches empty cells. Feeds the duplicate-link guard in Merge Comments.

nodes.name: Is Conflict
nodes.notes: True branch: stale-save conflict detected by Merge Comments — respond {ok:false, conflict:true, error} without writing. False branch: normal upsert path.

conditions.leftValue: ={{ ($('Read Existing Row').first().json && $('Read Existing Row').first().json.id) ? true : false }}
